Description: A fungal infection affects the skin, hair, or nails.
Precautions: Keep skin dry|Avoid sharing towels|Wear cotton clothes|Use antifungal medicine
Diet: Vitamin C fruits|Yogurt|Drink plenty of water
Doctor_Advice: Consult a dermatologist if symptoms persist.

Description: An allergy is an immune system reaction to certain substances.
Precautions: Avoid allergens|Keep surroundings clean|Wear a mask|Take prescribed medication
Doctor_Advice: Visit a doctor if symptoms become severe.

Description: GERD is a digestive disorder where stomach acid flows back into the esophagus.
Precautions: Avoid spicy foods|Eat smaller meals|Don't lie down after eating|Maintain healthy weight
Doctor_Advice: Consult a doctor if symptoms occur frequently.

Description: Diabetes affects the body's ability to regulate blood sugar.
Precautions: Monitor blood sugar|Exercise regularly|Take medication|Maintain healthy weight

Description: Hypertension is persistently high blood pressure.
Precautions: Reduce salt intake|Exercise|Avoid smoking|Monitor blood pressure
